items.purpose: Load a pipeline for a specific task.
Instantiates a pipeline object for a specific natural language task.
Runs inference on a batch of inputs through the loaded pipeline.
Loads a pipeline onto a specific GPU device for accelerated inference.
Loads a pipeline with half-precision weights to reduce memory usage.
Configures a classification pipeline to return scores for all labels.
Loads a pretrained tokenizer from the Hugging Face Hub.
Loads a pretrained base model without a task-specific head.
Loads a pretrained model with a causal language modeling head.
Instantiates a task-specific pipeline using a pretrained model.
Loads the configuration object of a pretrained model.
Loads a pretrained model with a sequence classification head.
Tokenizes a text string and returns a dictionary of tensors.
Accesses the list of integer token IDs from a tokenizer output.
Accesses the attention mask indicating which tokens to attend.
Converts a sequence of token IDs back into a readable string.
Tokenizes a batch of texts and pads them to the same length.
Converts a text string into a list of integer token IDs.
Generates text tokens autoregressively from input token IDs.
Performs a forward pass through the model and returns logits or hidden states.
Accesses the raw model output scores for each token position.
Converts logits into a probability distribution over the vocabulary.
Generates tokens using top-k and nucleus sampling for diversity.
Sets the model to evaluation mode disabling dropout and batch norm updates.
Initializes a trainer object that handles training loops and evaluation.
Defines hyperparameters and output paths for the training loop.
Dynamically pads a batch of inputs to the longest sequence in the batch.
Defines a custom metric function that receives predictions and labels.
Runs the full training loop over the training dataset.
Evaluates the model on the evaluation dataset and returns metrics.
Wraps a base model with parameter-efficient fine-tuning adapters.
Configures a LoRA adapter with specified rank and target modules.
Loads a PEFT adapter into an existing base model.
Merges the adapter weights into the base model and returns the full model.
Base configuration class for all parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods.
Specifies the task type for sequence classification when configuring PEFT.
